---
title: "Importance of abiotic and biotic factors on network structure in novel ecosystems"
image: "../images/card_pics/miconia.jpg"
description: "This project evaluates how both environmental factors (e.g., climate, habitat) and biological interactions determine network architecture in novel ecosystems. Results inform how ecological complexity persists or erodes with disturbance."
categories: ["Hawaii VINE Project"]
contributors: "Corey Tarwater, Jinelle Sperry, Jeferson Vizentin-Bugoni, Jeff Foster, Don Drake"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
